## Tracking

Tracking: #ISSUE_NUMBER

## Summary

- What changed:
- Why:

## Risk

- Risk level: low / medium / high
- Main failure mode:
- Rollback:

## Validation

- [ ] Agent contract check
- [ ] Relevant repository tests
- [ ] Build, lint, or static checks
- [ ] Manual verification, when applicable

## Coordination

- [ ] I checked for an existing PR for this issue or task.
- [ ] I checked for overlapping files in other open PRs.
- [ ] Review conversations are resolved on the final head.
